sources.cleaned_content:
GYEON - Q²M Glass+

Brand: GYEON

GYEON Q²M Glass Plus is a premium, hydrophobic glass cleaner that effectively removes dirt, watermarks, and streaks. Its advanced formula ensures a streak-free finish, offering enhanced visibility and safety.

Price: From £14.50 (Ex VAT: £12.08)

Sizes Available:
- 500ml - £14.50 inc. vat (Stock: 18)
- 1L - £24.00 inc. vat (Stock: 7)

In Stock.

Description:
Gyeon Q2M Glass+ is an efficient hydrophobic glass cleaner that combines great cleaning power with added repellency properties for maximum clarity and clear vision in all conditions. Q2M Glass+ is based on the same formula as Q2M Glass and doesn't disappoint when it comes to ease of use. Q2M Glass+ effortlessly removes any dirt & grime with ease, whilst leaving behind a slick and anti-static surface both on the interior and exterior glass.

Q2M Glass+ doesn't just clean well but will add a noticeable slickness to your glass, enhancing your vision in wet conditions, even at low speeds. It can be used over any existing rain repellent on the vehicle and will act as a great hydrophobic booster.

Using Gyeon Q2M Glass+:
Spray Q2M Glass+ onto a Gyeon Q2M Glass Wipe EVO towel, rather than directly onto the glass. This will help with better coverage and less overspray. Wipe the glass down ensuring any excess is removed for a streak-free finish. Use a second towel if necessary. Q2M Glass+ is safe for use on plexi or polycarbonate elements as well as on LCD screens or monitors.

Sizes Available: 500ml & 1L

GYEON Q²M Glass+ Plus

Brand: Gyeon

Price: $28.00 CAD (500ml) / $48.00 CAD (1L)

Barcode (500ml): 8809432676232
Barcode (1L): 8809432676249

Slick and Anti static
Spray Q²M Glass+ on a short hair microfiber towel rather than directly on the glass. It may be used on Plexi or polycarbonate elements, as well as on LCD screens or monitors.
CONSUMPTION: 40ml/car

Clean & Coat
Based on the well-known Q²M Glass formula, Q²M Glass+ doesn't disappoint when it comes to ease of use. It effortlessly removes any dirt and grime while leaving a slick and anti-static glass surface on both interior and exterior glass.

SELF CLEANING & REPELENCY
Using Q²M Glass+ during your wash routine will add noticeable slickness to your glass, enhancing your vision in wet conditions, even at low speed. It can be used over any existing rain repellent on the car and will act as a great hydrophobic booster.

Tip: Using Glass+ on top of GYEON View or Quick View can really extend the life of your ceramic coating. It also adds slickness to eliminate any wiper chatter with other glass coatings.

EFFICIENT HYDROPHOBIC GLASS CLEANER. GYEON GLASS+

Q²M Glass+ combines great cleaning power with added repellency properties for maximum clarity and clear vision in all conditions.

EASY & EFFICIENT
Based on the well know Q²M Glass formula, Q²M Glass+ doesn't disappoint when it comes to ease of use. It will effortlessly remove any dirt & grime while leaving a slick and anti-static glass surface on both interior and exterior glass.

SELF CLEANING & REPELLENCY
Using Q²M Glass+ during your wash routine will add noticeable slickness to your glass, enhancing your vision in wet conditions even at low speed. It can be used over any existing rain repellent on the car and will act as a great hydrophobic booster.

BEST PRACTICE AND PRO TIPS FROM YVES HEYLEN
Spray Q²M Glass+ on a short hair microfibre towel rather than directly on the glass. It may be used on Plexi or polycarbonate elements as well as on LCD screens or monitors.
CONSUMPTION: 40ml/car

FAQ:

Can Glass+ be used on tint and interior glass?
Yes, it's safe on interior glass and tint as well. It will also make the inside glass easier to clean down the road.

Can I use Glass+ to clean wipers too?
Yes, it is highly encouraged to do so. It not only cleans but also makes your wipers chatter-free.

How long does it last?
Glass+ will last around 3 months. Also a great option to quickly coat glass affordably for dealerships or volume car washes.

Can I apply it on plexi glass?
Yes. A must for motorcycle fairings.

Can I apply it on LCD screens?
Yes, it will also help with removing finger oil that much easier.

sources.page_title: Gyeon Q²M Glass+ Hydrophobic Glass Cleaner (500ml)
sources.cleaned_content:
Gyeon Q²M Glass+ Hydrophobic Glass Cleaner (500ml)

Brand: GYEON
Product code: GGLX500

Selected Size: 500ml
Price: £16.00
In Stock

Hydrophobic Glass Cleaner & Booster!

Elevate your glass care routine with GYEON Q²M Glass+—a revolutionary 2-in-1 cleaner and hydrophobic booster that delivers crystal clarity and enhanced water repellency in one effortless step. Perfect for maintaining pristine visibility in all weather conditions, this advanced formula cleans, protects, and enhances existing rain repellents while being safe for all glass surfaces.

For professional results always use with a high-quality glass towel (like GYEON Silk Glass), avoid direct sunlight during application and reapply every 2-3 washes for consistent hydrophobic performance.

See better, stay safer—glass that repels rain and resists dirt!

Why Choose GYEON Q²M Glass+?
- 2-in-1 Formula – Cleans + Boosts Hydrophobicity in a single application
- Enhanced Visibility – Improves rain beading and self-cleaning properties
- Coating-Safe – Works over existing repellents (like GYEON View) without degrading them
- Multi-Surface Use – Safe for auto glass, plexiglass, polycarbonate & LCD screens
- Anti-Static – Reduces dust attraction for longer-lasting clarity

Features:
- Streak-Free Cleaning – Removes dirt, grime, and fingerprints effortlessly
- Hydrophobic Boost – Adds slickness and water-repellency to any glass
- Pleasant Scent – No harsh chemical odors
- Low Consumption – Only 40mL per full car
- Interior-Friendly – Safe for navigation screens, gauges, and touch displays

Specification:
- Coverage: ~40mL per full car
- Safe On: Tempered & laminated auto glass, Plexiglass/polycarbonate, LCD screens & infotainment systems
- Best Paired With: GYEON View coatings (for extended protection)

How To Use:
- Spray onto a Microfiber – Apply to a short-pile towel (avoid direct spraying on glass).
- Wipe in Straight Lines – Clean from top to bottom for even coverage.
- Buff Dry – For maximum hydrophobic effect, allow to dry completely.

Pro Tip: Use weekly as part of your wash routine to maintain peak water repellency and optical clarity!

Available Sizes: 500ml

Customer Reviews:
There aren't any reviews for this product yet.

Gyeon Q2M Glass Cleaner

Brand: GYEON
SKU: 116032
Price: $19.99 AUD
Sizes: 500ml / 4L

Description:
Q²M Glass Cleaner is the ultimate formula for fast, effortless and effective cleaning of all automotive glass surfaces. Removes oily residue and instantly leaves a smudge free finish.

Features and Benefits:
- Removes all dirt, grime, and fingerprints from glass surfaces
- Leaves a streak-free finish without leaving any residue
- Safe for use on all types of glass surfaces, including tinted windows
- Fast and easy to use with a spray-on formula
- Provides a clear and unobstructed view while driving
- Contains no harmful chemicals or abrasive agents

Q²M Glass Cleaner is safe and effective. Removes dirt, oily residue and even light contamination while not affecting previously applied rain repellents. A gentle aroma boosts the superb qualities of the product.

Gyeon Q2M Glass Cleaner is fast and easy to use, thanks to its convenient spray-on formula. Simply spray the cleaner onto the glass surface and wipe it off with a microfiber cloth. The result is a perfectly clean and clear surface that enhances the overall appearance of your car. Its powerful cleaning properties make it an ideal solution for removing even the toughest dirt and grime from your car's windows and windshield.

Gyeon Q2M Glass Cleaner is the perfect choice for anyone looking for a high-quality, streak-free glass cleaner that delivers exceptional results every time. Whether you're a car enthusiast or a professional detailer, Gyeon Q2M Glass Cleaner is a must-have product in your detailing tool kit.

Gyeon Q²M Glass+ - Hydrophobic Glass Cleaner

Brand: Gyeon
SKU: Q2M GLASS PLUS 500
In stock

Price: $25.99 (500ml) / $42.99 (1000ml)

Description:
Q²M Glass+ combines great cleaning power with added repellency properties for maximum clarity and clear vision in all conditions. Based on the well know Q²M Glass formula, Q²M Glass+ doesn't disappoint when it comes to ease of use. It will effortlessly remove any dirt & grime while leaving a slick and anti-static glass surface on both interior and exterior glass.

Q²M GLASS+

Category: Exterior / Interior / Maintenance

Enhanced glass cleaner with added repellency.

Q²M Glass+ is a glass cleaner designed to clean and improve visibility while leaving a light hydrophobic effect. It removes dirt, fingerprints and oily residue while adding temporary water repellency to glass surfaces.

Efficient hydrophobic glass cleaner
Q²M Glass+ combines effective glass cleaning with added water repellency. It improves driving visibility in wet conditions and reduces the need for frequent glass cleaning.

Key Benefits:
- INSTANT WATER REPELLENCY
- SLICKNESS AND SELF CLEANING
- INCREASED VISIBILITY

What makes Q2M GLASS+ so special?
- Cleans glass while adding light water repellency
- Improves visibility in wet conditions

TECHNICAL DETAILS:
Capacities: 500 ML / 1000 ML
Consumption: 40ml/car

HOW TO USE:
01. Spray Q²M Glass+ onto the glass surface or a microfibre towel.
02. Wipe evenly to remove contamination.
03. Buff to a clear finish using a second towel.
04. Ensure even coverage for consistent repellency.
05. Reapply as needed.

FREQUENTLY ASKED QUESTIONS:

Does Q²M Glass+ replace a glass coating?
No. It provides temporary repellency only.

Can it be used on interior glass?
Yes. It is suitable for interior and exterior use.

Does it leave streaks?
Do not over use the product and use clean and correct microfibers.

How long does the repellency last?
It is short term and depends on usage and conditions.

Is it safe on coated glass?
Yes. It is safe for coated and uncoated glass.
